title: Create recording and reading app with class structure

requirements.text: Create a 2/7 class structure in the backend to organize recording and reading data models

quotes: just Tara app make create one 2/7 class

acceptanceCriteria: Backend includes a class structure that supports the 2/7 organizational model
Data models are properly typed and structured for recording and reading features

requirements.text: Implement audio recording functionality that allows users to create and save voice recordings
acceptanceCriteria: Users can start and stop audio recording
Recordings are saved with metadata (timestamp, duration)
Recording interface shows visual feedback during capture

requirements.text: Implement reading playback functionality that allows users to play back recorded audio
acceptanceCriteria: Users can select and play recordings
Playback controls include play, pause, and seek

requirements.text: Create a comprehensive settings page with all configuration options for recording quality, storage preferences, and playback settings
acceptanceCriteria: Settings page includes recording quality options
Settings page includes storage and data management options
Settings are persisted and applied across the application

requirements.text: Store recordings in the backend with the 2/7 class organizational structure, enabling retrieval and management
acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores recording metadata and audio data
Recordings are organized according to the 2/7 class structure
CRUD operations are available for recording management

requirements.text: Design a cohesive visual theme with warm, accessible colors and clear typography that emphasizes usability for a recording and reading application
acceptanceCriteria: Application uses a consistent color palette suited for audio/reading applications
UI components follow a unified design language
Layout prioritizes ease of access to recording and playback controls

constraints: Audio recording must work in modern web browsers using Web APIs
Backend must follow single-actor architecture for all data storage

required: Microphone icon for recording button in minimalist style (mic-icon.dim_64x64.png)
Playback icon for reading button in minimalist style (play-icon.dim_64x64.png)
